name: Altan Nevada Minerals Limited
summary: Altan Nevada Minerals Limited, a mineral exploration and development company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in the United States. It explores for gold, copper, iron, and silver ores. The company holds 100% interest in the Venus project comprising 204 unpatented mining claims covering approximately 2,165 acres located in the Pumpkin Hollow area, Yerington District. It also holds 100% interest in the Marble Station project, which comprises 50 mining claims located in Yerington District; and Yellow Cone project situated in Nye County, Nevada. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
